task_completion.description: Create a Navy Blue polo or T-shirt with visible outlines
task_completion.visual_evidence: A drawing of a polo or T-shirt colored Navy Blue with clear visible outlines on the EdrawMax canvas.

task_completion.description: Add a Dark Grey or Black pocket and a Yellow logo badge
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Dark Grey or Black shape representing a pocket on the left chest area of the shirt, and a Yellow rectangle or badge shape representing a logo.

task_completion.description: Include the title 'SkyHigh Logistics - Uniform Spec v1' at the top
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text reading 'SkyHigh Logistics - Uniform Spec v1' positioned at the top of the drawing canvas.

task_completion.description: Add callouts for 'Embroidered Logo', 'Contrast Pocket', and 'Double Stitch Hem'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text labels or callout boxes containing 'Embroidered Logo', 'Contrast Pocket', and 'Double Stitch Hem' with lines or arrows pointing to the yellow badge, dark pocket, and bottom hem respectively.
The EdrawMax window title bar showing 'uniform_spec.eddx' or a save dialog confirming the file is being saved to the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

task_completion.description: Export the design as an image to /home/ga/Documents/uniform_spec.png
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog in EdrawMax, a file manager window, or an image viewer showing 'uniform_spec.png' successfully created in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the sketch
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the EdrawMax application open with the drawing being actively constructed using its tools, rather than terminal windows running scripts to generate the files.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application canvas
integrity.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax interface (toolbars, panels, canvas) is visible with individual shapes and text boxes being manipulated, proving the image wasn't just pasted in as a single flat image.

integrity.description: The PNG export was done via the application's export feature
integrity.visual_evidence: The file menu, export dialog, or 'Save As' dialog in EdrawMax is used to generate the PNG, rather than using terminal commands to convert or mock the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected EDDX file path: /home/ga/Documents/uniform_spec.eddx. Expected PNG file path: /home/ga/Documents/uniform_spec.png. Required text in the design: 'SkyHigh Logistics', 'Embroidered Logo', 'Contrast Pocket', 'Double Stitch'. Minimum EDDX file size: 5 KB.
